S.FORM: Brent Armitage kawas tay 1965, Brent Armitage, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Brent Armitage kawas tay 1965, Brent Armitage, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: βrent armitaɣe kawas~ɕ taj ****, βrent armitaɣe, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
